raw_response: I agree with the previous conclusion. Fluoroquinolones have been well-documented to disrupt the normal gut flora by broad-spectrum activity against various bacteria including those typically present in healthy intestines. This disruption creates an environment where C. difficile can proliferate unchecked due to reduced competition from other organisms.
